home.faq1_a: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize is an industrial liquid oxidizer used in metalworking, refining, mineral extraction, and chemical manufacturing. It is a high-density chemical compound manufactured by UE Chemicals in Bangkok, Thailand. It is commonly used for crushing and processing metals and minerals in industrial settings.
home.faq2_q: What is red mercury used for?
home.faq2_a: Red Liquid Mercury is used in specialized industrial and research applications. Our Red Liquid Mercury has a 99.999% purity (5N grade) and a density of 20.2 g/cm³. It is available for purchase from certified suppliers like UE Chemicals with full documentation.
home.faq3_q: Where can I buy silver liquid mercury?
home.faq3_a: You can buy Silver Liquid Mercury from UE Chemicals at useful-chemicals.com. We supply 99.99% purity (4N grade) elemental mercury for gold extraction, scientific instruments, and industrial applications with worldwide shipping from Bangkok, Thailand.
home.faq4_a: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize is a legal industrial chemical when purchased for legitimate industrial purposes such as metalworking, refining, and mineral extraction. Regulations vary by country. UE Chemicals ensures full compliance with international chemical trade regulations including REACH.
home.faq5_q: What are the uses of mercury in industry?
home.faq5_a: Mercury is used in gold and precious metal extraction, scientific measurement instruments (thermometers, barometers), electrical and electronic equipment, chemical synthesis, and laboratory research. Silver Liquid Mercury (99.99% purity) is the standard grade for most industrial and scientific applications.
home.faq6_a: Yes, UE Chemicals ships worldwide from Bangkok, Thailand using licensed hazardous materials carriers. We deliver to Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, and Oceania with full compliance documentation and secure packaging.

safety.meta_title: Safe Handling for Caluanie and Mercury
safety.meta_desc: Review storage, PPE, spill response, and SDS guidance for handling Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Mercury, and Silver Mercury safely.
safety.hero_sub: At UE Chemicals, we prioritize safety in the production, handling, and usage of our products. Ensuring the well-being of workers and maintaining safe operational standards are core to our mission.
safety.pillar1_desc: Comprehensive PPE requirements and handling protocols for every product.
safety.pillar2_desc: Proper containment, temperature control, and environmental safeguards.
safety.pillar3_desc: Spill response procedures and first aid measures for every scenario.
safety.pillar4_desc: Full Safety Data Sheets and Certificates of Analysis with every order.
safety.cal_prec1: Always wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), including gloves, goggles, and a lab coat.
safety.cal_prec2: Handle in a well-ventilated area to minimize the risk of inhaling fumes.
safety.cal_prec3: Avoid direct contact with skin and eyes; in case of contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical attention if irritation persists.
safety.cal_stor1: Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and heat sources.
safety.cal_stor2: Keep the container tightly sealed when not in use.
safety.cal_stor3: Ensure the storage area is equipped with spill containment measures.
safety.cal_emrg1: Spill Response: Contain spills with absorbent material and dispose of it following local hazardous waste regulations.
safety.cal_emrg2: First Aid: If inhaled, move the affected person to fresh air immediately. If ingested, do not induce vomiting; seek medical attention promptly.
safety.red_prec1: Use in a controlled environment with adequate ventilation, preferably under a fume hood.
safety.red_prec2: Always wear appropriate PPE, including protective gloves and eyewear.
safety.red_prec3: Do not ingest or inhale the substance; it is toxic and can be hazardous if improperly handled.
safety.red_stor1: Store in a secure, temperature-controlled environment.
safety.red_stor2: Keep out of reach of unauthorized personnel and ensure the container is leak-proof.
safety.red_stor3: Maintain records for inventory and usage in compliance with regulatory requirements.
safety.red_emrg1: Spill Response: Evacuate the area immediately, ventilate the space, and use appropriate spill kits designed for mercury containment.
safety.red_emrg2: First Aid: For skin contact, wash thoroughly with soap and water. For inhalation, move to fresh air and seek medical attention immediately.
safety.silver_prec1: Handle in a fume hood or well-ventilated area to prevent inhalation of mercury vapor.
safety.silver_prec2: Wear PPE including chemical-resistant gloves, safety goggles, and a lab coat.
safety.silver_prec3: Never heat or flame mercury in an uncontrolled environment.
safety.silver_stor1: Store in sealed, break-resistant containers in a designated chemical storage area.
safety.silver_stor2: Keep away from oxidizing agents, acids, and halogens.
safety.silver_stor3: Maintain a mercury spill kit in the storage area at all times.
safety.silver_emrg1: Spill Response: Isolate the area, ventilate, and collect mercury droplets using a mercury spill kit. Do NOT vacuum.
safety.silver_emrg2: First Aid: Remove contaminated clothing. Wash skin with soap and water for 15 minutes. Seek medical attention for any exposure.
safety.cta_desc: Request SDS, COA, and TDS documents for any of our products. Our team is ready to provide full safety documentation.
safety.commitment_title: Safety at the Core of Our Operations
safety.commitment_desc: UE Chemicals is committed to maintaining the highest safety standards across our entire operation. From production to delivery, every step in our process is designed with safety in mind.

silver_mercury.safety_desc: Silver Liquid Mercury is a hazardous substance requiring strict handling protocols:
silver_mercury.safety1: Handle in a fume hood or well-ventilated area to prevent mercury vapor inhalation.
silver_mercury.safety2: Wear full PPE: chemical-resistant gloves, safety goggles, and lab coat at all times.
silver_mercury.safety3: Store in sealed, break-resistant containers in a designated chemical storage area.
silver_mercury.safety4: Maintain mercury spill kits nearby. Never vacuum mercury spills.
silver_mercury.quote_desc: Contact us for Silver Liquid Mercury pricing, availability, and documentation. Quote delivered within 24 hours.
silver_mercury.form_placeholder_message: Tell us about your quantity, intended use, and delivery destination...
silver_mercury.faq1_q: What purity grade is your Silver Mercury?
silver_mercury.faq1_a: Our Silver Liquid Mercury is 99.99% purity (4N Grade), verified by our in-house laboratory with Certificate of Analysis included.
silver_mercury.faq2_q: Can it be used for gold extraction?
silver_mercury.faq2_a: Yes, Silver Liquid Mercury is widely used in gold amalgamation and precious metal extraction processes.
silver_mercury.faq3_a: Shipped in UN-approved 34.5 kg steel flasks via licensed hazmat carriers. Full ADR/IMDG/IATA compliance.
silver_mercury.faq4_a: Standard sizes: 34.5 kg flask, 76 lbs, and 2204 lbs. Custom quantities available on request.
silver_mercury.faq5_a: Every order includes Certificate of Analysis (COA), Safety Data Sheet (SDS), and Technical Data Sheet (TDS).
silver_mercury.faq6_a: Worldwide — Europe, Asia, Americas, Africa, and Oceania via licensed hazardous materials carriers.

faq.meta_desc: Find answers to common questions about Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Mercury, Silver Mercury — ordering, shipping, safety, and compliance.
faq.hero_sub: Find answers to common questions about our products, ordering process, shipping, safety guidelines, and compliance documentation.
faq.cta_desc: Our team is ready to help with any product, ordering, or technical questions. We respond within 24 hours.
faq.cant_find_desc: Contact our team for personalized help.
faq.general_desc: Basic information about UE Chemicals and our operations.
faq.gen1_a: UE Chemicals is a specialty chemical manufacturer and supplier based in Bangkok, Thailand. We produce and distribute industrial-grade Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Liquid Mercury, and Silver Liquid Mercury for legitimate industrial, scientific, and research applications worldwide.
faq.gen2_a: Our headquarters and manufacturing facility are located in Bangkok, 10110, Thailand. We serve customers globally with international shipping to all continents.
faq.gen3_q: Are you a manufacturer or distributor?
faq.gen3_a: UE Chemicals is both a manufacturer and direct supplier. Our products are produced in our own facility, ensuring full quality control from production to delivery.
faq.gen4_a: We serve metalworking, mining, chemical manufacturing, scientific research, electronics, medical equipment, and precious metal recovery industries.
faq.gen5_q: How long has UE Chemicals been in business?
faq.gen5_a: UE Chemicals has been supplying industrial chemicals to clients worldwide, building a reputation for quality, safety, and reliable service.
faq.products_desc: Information about our chemical products and specifications.
faq.prod1_a: We offer three specialty chemicals: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize (liquid oxidizer for metalworking), Red Liquid Mercury (Sb₂O₇Hg₂, for research and specialized applications), and Silver Liquid Mercury (99.99% purity elemental mercury for instrumentation and extraction).
faq.prod2_q: What is Caluanie Muelear Oxidize used for?
faq.prod2_a: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize is used in metalworking, mineral extraction, chemical manufacturing, and industrial refining. It is a powerful oxidizing agent that breaks down metals and minerals efficiently.
faq.prod3_q: What is the purity of your Silver Mercury?
faq.prod3_a: Our Silver Liquid Mercury is certified at 99.99% purity (4N grade), verified by our in-house laboratory with a Certificate of Analysis (COA) included with every order.
faq.prod4_a: We can provide small sample quantities for qualified buyers. Contact our sales team to discuss your requirements and we will arrange sample delivery.
faq.prod5_q: What is the density of Red Liquid Mercury?
faq.prod5_a: Red Liquid Mercury has a density of approximately 20.2 g/cm³, making it one of the densest commercially available chemical compounds.
faq.ordering_desc: How to place orders and payment information.
faq.ord1_q: How do I place an order?
faq.ord1_a: Contact us via WhatsApp, email, or the contact form with your product, quantity, and destination. We'll send a Proforma Invoice within 24 hours with pricing, shipping costs, and payment instructions.
faq.ord2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.ord2_a: We accept bank wire transfers and cryptocurrency payments. Payment details and instructions are included in the Proforma Invoice.
faq.ord3_q: Is there a minimum order quantity?
faq.ord3_a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Contact our sales team for current MOQ information and pricing for your specific requirements.
faq.ord4_q: Do you offer bulk or wholesale discounts?
faq.ord4_a: Yes, we offer significant volume discounts for bulk and wholesale orders. Our wholesale program includes dedicated account management, priority shipping, and competitive pricing.
faq.ord5_q: Can I get a Proforma Invoice before ordering?
faq.ord5_a: Yes, we provide detailed Proforma Invoices with product pricing, shipping costs, delivery timeline, and payment instructions before you commit to an order.
faq.shipping_desc: Delivery times, methods, and international shipping.
faq.ship1_a: Yes, we ship worldwide from Bangkok, Thailand to all continents — Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, and Oceania — using licensed hazardous materials carriers.
faq.ship2_a: Delivery times vary by destination: EU 3-7 business days, UK 5-10 days, North America 7-14 days, Asia & Middle East 10-21 days, Africa & Oceania 14-25 days. Tracking is provided for all shipments.
faq.ship3_q: Is the packaging safe for hazardous chemicals?
faq.ship3_a: All products are shipped in UN-specification containers with proper hazmat labeling, tamper-proof sealing, and full transport documentation. We comply with ADR (road), IMDG (sea), and IATA (air) regulations.
faq.ship4_a: Yes, tracking information is provided for all shipments. You will receive tracking details once your order is dispatched from our facility.
faq.ship5_a: Yes, all shipments are fully insured against loss and damage during transit for your complete peace of mind.
faq.safe1_q: What safety documentation do you provide?
faq.safe1_a: Every order includes a Safety Data Sheet (SDS), Certificate of Analysis (COA), and Technical Data Sheet (TDS). SDS documents are available in multiple languages upon request.
faq.safe2_q: What PPE is required for handling?
faq.safe2_a: All our chemical products require appropriate PPE including chemical-resistant gloves, safety goggles, lab coats, and in some cases, respiratory protection. Specific requirements are detailed in the product SDS.
faq.safe3_a: All chemicals should be stored in cool, dry, well-ventilated areas away from direct sunlight, heat sources, and incompatible materials. Containers should be kept tightly sealed when not in use.
faq.safe4_q: What do I do in case of a spill?
faq.safe4_a: Evacuate the area, ensure adequate ventilation, and use appropriate spill containment kits. Mercury spills require specialized mercury spill kits — never vacuum mercury. Detailed procedures are in the product SDS.
faq.comp1_a: Yes, all our products fully comply with EU REACH Regulation (EC) No. 1907/2006. Substances are registered and documented per European Chemical Agency (ECHA) requirements.
faq.comp2_q: Do you provide Certificates of Analysis?
faq.comp2_a: Yes, batch-specific Certificates of Analysis (COA) are included with every order, detailing purity, trace elements, density, and physical properties verified by our laboratory.
faq.comp3_q: What certifications does UE Chemicals hold?
faq.comp3_a: We maintain ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management), ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental Management), and ISO 45001:2018 (Occupational Health & Safety) certifications, plus full REACH and CLP compliance.
faq.comp4_q: Do you comply with mercury regulations?
faq.comp4_a: Yes, we fully comply with the EU Mercury Regulation (EU 2017/852 and amendments). All mercury products are sold only for legitimate, permitted uses.
faq.comp5_a: Yes, we can provide custom documentation including end-use certificates, customs declarations, and translated SDS documents to meet your specific regulatory requirements.

wholesale.hero_sub: Competitive bulk pricing for Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Liquid Mercury, and Silver Liquid Mercury. Direct from our facility in Bangkok, Thailand.
wholesale.benefits_desc: Whether you're a distributor, manufacturer, or large-scale operation, our wholesale program saves you money while guaranteeing consistent supply.
wholesale.ben1_desc: Significant price reductions on bulk orders. The more you order, the more you save. Custom quotes for repeat buyers.
wholesale.ben2_desc: Personal account manager for priority support, order tracking, and streamlined reordering.
wholesale.ben3_desc: Priority processing and expedited shipping. Scheduled recurring deliveries for production continuity.
wholesale.ben4_desc: Every order includes COA, SDS, TDS, and customs documentation for regulatory compliance.
wholesale.ben5_desc: Customized quantities from small bulk to full container loads. Steel flasks and custom packaging.
wholesale.ben6_desc: Licensed hazmat carriers for safe international delivery. EU, Americas, Asia, Africa. Full ADR/IMDG compliance.
wholesale.proc1_desc: Contact us with product, quantity, and destination. Our wholesale team responds within 24 hours.
wholesale.proc2_desc: Detailed invoice with wholesale pricing, shipping costs, payment instructions, and delivery timeline.
wholesale.proc3_desc: Review and confirm. We accept bank wire transfers and cryptocurrency. Processing takes 1–5 business days.

certificates.meta_desc: Quality certifications, ISO compliance, and analytical documentation for all UE Chemicals products.
certificates.hero_sub: Every chemical we supply meets the highest purity standards, backed by rigorous quality control, internationally recognized certifications, and full batch documentation.
certificates.overview_desc1: At UE Chemicals, quality is not a marketing claim — it is a measurable, documented fact. Every batch of product that leaves our facility in Bangkok, Thailand is accompanied by a full suite of analytical documentation, so you can independently verify exactly what you are receiving.
certificates.overview_desc2: Our quality management system covers the entire supply chain: raw material sourcing, in-house purification and processing, analytical testing, packaging, storage, and hazmat-compliant shipping. We maintain stringent protocols at every stage to guarantee consistency, purity, and safety.
certificates.trust_desc: Independent laboratory testing on every batch
certificates.certs_desc: Our operations comply with the world's leading standards for quality management, environmental stewardship, and occupational safety.
certificates.iso9001_desc: Certified quality management ensuring consistent product quality, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement across all processes — from procurement to delivery.
certificates.iso14001_desc: Environmental management system minimizing impact through responsible handling, waste management, and emissions control at our Bangkok facility.
certificates.iso45001_desc: Occupational health and safety system ensuring safe chemical handling, storage, and transport procedures for employees and customers alike.
certificates.reach_desc: All products fully compliant with EU REACH. Substances registered and documented per European Chemical Agency (ECHA) requirements for safe market access.
certificates.clp_desc: Products classified, labelled, and packaged per CLP Regulation (EC) No. 1272/2008 with GHS-compliant hazard pictograms, signal words, and safety statements.
certificates.adr_desc: All shipments comply with ADR (road) and IMDG (sea) regulations. UN packaging, hazard labelling, and full transport documentation with every order.
certificates.docs_desc: Full transparency and traceability — every shipment comes with comprehensive documentation you can share with regulators, clients, and internal QA teams.
certificates.coa_desc: Batch-specific analytical report detailing purity, trace elements, density, and physical properties — verified by our in-house laboratory.
certificates.sds_desc: 16-section SDS compliant with EU Regulation (EC) No. 1907/2006, Annex II. Available in your preferred language.
certificates.tds_desc: Detailed specification sheet outlining chemical/physical properties, recommended uses, storage, and compatibility info.
certificates.qc_desc: From raw material intake to final dispatch, every product passes through five rigorous quality checkpoints.
certificates.qc1_desc: All incoming raw materials undergo rigorous inspection and testing. Only materials meeting strict purity thresholds enter the production pipeline.
certificates.qc2_desc: Advanced purification techniques including multi-stage distillation and filtration ensure final product purity reaches 99.99% (4N) to 99.999% (5N) grade.
certificates.qc3_desc: Every batch is tested in our analytical laboratory — purity, density, trace impurities, and physical properties compared against specifications.
certificates.qc4_desc: Only batches passing all checks are released. COA, SDS, and TDS generated before packaging and shipping.
certificates.qc5_desc: UN-rated containers compliant with ADR/IMDG standards. Final inspection verifies labelling, sealing, and documentation before dispatch.
certificates.cta_title: Need Documentation or Have Quality Questions?
certificates.cta_desc: Request sample COA, SDS, or TDS before placing your order. Our technical team is happy to provide documentation or answer any quality-related inquiries.

shipping.meta_desc: International chemical shipping from Bangkok, Thailand. ADR, IMDG compliant. Safe, tracked delivery worldwide.
shipping.hero_sub: Safe, compliant international delivery of hazardous chemical products with full documentation, insurance, and real-time tracking.
shipping.overview_desc: UE Chemicals ships from our facility in Bangkok, Thailand to destinations across all continents. Every shipment is handled by licensed hazardous materials carriers with full regulatory compliance.
shipping.ov1_desc: We ship to Europe, Asia, Africa, North & South America, and Oceania via licensed carriers.
shipping.ov2_desc: All shipments are insured against loss and damage during transit for complete peace of mind.
shipping.ov3_desc: SDS, TDS, COA, customs declarations, and transport documents included with every shipment.
shipping.ov4_desc: Products shipped in UN-specification containers with proper hazmat labeling and tamper-proof sealing.
shipping.regs_desc: All shipments comply with international hazardous goods transport frameworks for maximum safety.
shipping.road_desc: European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road.
shipping.sea_desc: International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code for ocean shipments.
shipping.air_desc: International Air Transport Association Dangerous Goods Regulations.
shipping.pack_desc: All chemical products are packaged in UN-specification containers rated for hazardous materials transport, ensuring product integrity and safety throughout the entire logistics chain.
shipping.pack1_desc: Standard 34.5 kg / 76 lbs UN-approved steel flasks for mercury products. Sealed and pressure-tested.
shipping.pack2_desc: High-density polyethylene bottles in steel drums with absorbent cushioning for oxidizers.
shipping.pack3_desc: Every package labeled with UN number, proper shipping name, hazard class, and packing group.
shipping.pack4_desc: Sealed containers with tamper-evident closures and security indicators for maximum protection.
shipping.timeline_desc: From our warehouse in Bangkok, Thailand to your destination.
shipping.tl_note: Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to customs processing, destination regulations, and carrier schedules. Real-time tracking is provided for all shipments.
shipping.proc1_desc: Submit your product inquiry via our contact form or email. Include product, quantity, and destination.
shipping.proc2_desc: We'll send a detailed invoice with pricing, shipping costs, payment details, and delivery timeline.
shipping.proc3_desc: Complete payment via bank wire or cryptocurrency. Orders processed within 1–3 business days.
shipping.proc4_desc: Receive tracking details and monitor your shipment from our warehouse to your doorstep.
shipping.cta_title: Ready to Ship? Get a Quote Today
shipping.cta_desc: Contact us with your product, quantity, and destination for a detailed shipping quote including costs, timelines, and documentation requirements.

privacy.meta_title: Privacy Policy and Data Use | UE Chemicals
privacy.meta_desc: Privacy Policy for UE Chemicals. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.hero_sub: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information in compliance with the GDPR.
privacy.intro_desc: UE Chemicals ("we," "our," or "us"), located at Bangkok, 10110, Thailand, is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website useful-chemicals.com or interact with our services.
privacy.provided_item1: Contact information: name, email address, phone number, and company name when you submit a quote request or contact form.
privacy.provided_item2: Order information: product inquiries, quantity requirements, and shipping details.
privacy.provided_item3: Communication data: any messages or correspondence you send to us.
privacy.auto_item1: Usage data: IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages visited, and time spent on our site.
privacy.auto_item2: Cookies: we use essential cookies to ensure proper website functionality. See Section 7 for details.
privacy.how_use_intro: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
privacy.how_use_item1: Responding to your inquiries and quote requests.
privacy.how_use_item3: Sending order confirmations and shipping notifications.
privacy.how_use_item4: Improving our website, products, and customer experience.
privacy.how_use_item5: Complying with legal obligations and regulatory requirements.
privacy.how_use_item6: Communicating about product updates, safety information, or changes to our terms.
privacy.basis_intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we process your data based on:
privacy.basis1_desc: When you voluntarily submit a contact or quote form.
privacy.basis2_desc: To process your orders and provide our services.
privacy.basis3_desc: To improve our services and ensure website security.
privacy.basis4_desc: To comply with applicable laws and regulations.
privacy.sharing_intro: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with:
privacy.sharing_item1: Service providers: trusted third-party services that assist with email delivery, hosting, and analytics, bound by confidentiality agreements.
privacy.sharing_item2: Legal authorities: when required by law, regulation, or legal process.
privacy.sharing_item3: Business transfers: in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets.
privacy.retention_desc: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law. Quote requests and contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months unless you request earlier deletion.
privacy.cookies_desc: Our website uses essential cookies to ensure basic functionality (for example, remembering your cookie consent preference). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.rights_intro: Under the GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.right1_desc: Request a copy of your personal data.
privacy.right5_desc: Transfer your data to another controller.
privacy.right6_desc: Object to processing based on legitimate interest.
privacy.rights_contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
privacy.security_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encrypted data transmission (SSL/TLS) and secure hosting infrastructure.
privacy.transfers_desc: Your data may be processed outside the European Economic Area (EEA) by our service providers. In such cases, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.children_desc: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors.
privacy.changes_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
privacy.contact_intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your data rights, contact us at:

disclaimer.limitation_item1: The use or inability to use our products, including damages from improper handling, storage, or application.
disclaimer.limitation_item2: The use of or reliance on any information provided on this website.
disclaimer.limitation_item3: Any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in product descriptions or technical specifications.
disclaimer.limitation_item4: Personal injury, property damage, or environmental damage caused by misuse or failure to follow safety guidelines.
disclaimer.professional_intro: Our products are designed for use by trained professionals with appropriate knowledge and experience in handling hazardous chemicals. Users must:
disclaimer.professional_item1: Employ appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) at all times.
disclaimer.professional_item2: Ensure adequate ventilation and containment measures.
disclaimer.professional_item3: Follow all workplace health and safety regulations (EU Directive 89/391/EEC).
disclaimer.professional_item4: Maintain proper emergency response and spill containment plans.
disclaimer.professional_item5: Comply with CLP Regulation (EC 1272/2008) for hazard communication.
disclaimer.regulatory_desc: UE Chemicals operates in compliance with EU REACH Regulation (EC 1907/2006), EU Mercury Regulation (EU 2017/852), and all applicable German and EU chemical safety laws. However, it is the buyer's sole responsibility to ensure that the purchase, import, use, and disposal of our products comply with all laws and regulations applicable in their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.no_guarantee_desc: While our products are manufactured to the highest quality standards with certified purity levels, UE Chemicals does not guarantee specific results from the use of our products. Product performance may vary depending on application conditions, user expertise, and environmental factors.
disclaimer.third_party_desc: This website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience only and do not imply endorsement by UE Chemicals. We have no control over and accept no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites.
disclaimer.ip_desc: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, product descriptions, and technical data, is the intellectual property of UE Chemicals and is protected by German copyright law (Urheberrechtsgesetz). Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use of any content is prohibited without prior written consent.
disclaimer.indemnification_desc: By using our website or purchasing our products, you agree to indemnify and hold harmless UE Chemicals, its directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, damages, expenses, or liabilities arising from your use of our products or violation of this disclaimer.
disclaimer.changes_desc: UE Chemicals reserves the right to update or modify this disclaimer at any time without prior notice. Changes become effective upon publication on this website. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
disclaimer.governing_desc: This disclaimer is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Thailand. Any disputes arising from or in connection with this disclaimer shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Bangkok, Thailand.
